studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight

design.description: Parallel-group fixed target-dose trial with lifestyle intervention.

studies.population: Adults with obesity, or overweight with at least one weight-related complication, without diabetes.
studies.safetySummary: Gastrointestinal adverse events were the most common and were mainly mild to moderate; treatment discontinuation increased with dose.

sources.title: Tirzepatide Once Weekly for the Treatment of Obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight and Type 2 Diabetes

design.description: Parallel-group target-dose trial with lifestyle intervention.

studies.population: Adults with obesity or overweight and type 2 diabetes; weight management was an explicit objective.
studies.safetySummary: Gastrointestinal adverse events were most common, were generally mild to moderate, and occurred primarily during dose escalation.

sources.title: Tirzepatide once weekly for the treatment of obesity in people with type 2 diabetes

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight Following Intensive Lifestyle Intervention

design.description: A 12-week intensive-lifestyle lead-in preceded the 72-week randomized period.

studies.population: Adults with obesity or overweight who achieved at least 5% weight loss during an intensive lifestyle lead-in, without diabetes.
studies.safetySummary: Gastrointestinal adverse events were the most common and were primarily mild to moderate.

sources.title: Tirzepatide after intensive lifestyle intervention in adults with overweight or obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight for the Maintenance of Weight Loss

design.description: After a 36-week open-label tirzepatide lead-in, participants were randomized to continue maximum tolerated dose or switch to placebo for 52 weeks.

studies.population: Adults with obesity or overweight and a weight-related complication, without diabetes, who completed the tirzepatide lead-in.
studies.safetySummary: Gastrointestinal adverse events were most common and were largely mild to moderate.

sources.title: Continued Treatment With Tirzepatide for Maintenance of Weight Reduction in Adults With Obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide Compared With Semaglutide in Participants With Obesity or Overweight

design.description: Active-comparator parallel-group trial using maximum tolerated doses.

studies.population: Adults with obesity, or overweight with at least one weight-related complication, without diabetes.
studies.safetySummary: Gastrointestinal adverse events were most common in both groups and were mainly mild to moderate during dose escalation.

sources.title: Tirzepatide as Compared with Semaglutide for the Treatment of Obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide for Maintenance of Body Weight Reduction in Participants With Obesity or Overweight

design.description: After a 60-week maximum-tolerated-dose lead-in, participants were randomized to continue that dose, reduce to 5 mg, or switch to placebo for 52 weeks.

studies.population: Adults with obesity or overweight who completed 60 weeks of tirzepatide treatment.
studies.safetySummary: The safety profile was consistent with prior tirzepatide studies; gastrointestinal events were the most common adverse events.

sources.title: Tirzepatide for maintenance of bodyweight reduction in adults with obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide in Participants With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction and Obesity

design.description: Event-driven parallel-group trial with a maximum tolerated tirzepatide dose.

studies.population: Adults with heart failure with preserved ejection fraction and obesity.
studies.overallDuration: At least 52 weeks; median follow-up 104 weeks
studies.safetySummary: Adverse events leading to treatment discontinuation occurred more frequently with tirzepatide and were mainly gastrointestinal.

sources.title: Tirzepatide for Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction and Obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Study of Tirzepatide in Chinese Participants With Obesity or Overweight

design.description: Parallel-group target-dose trial conducted in China.

studies.population: Chinese adults with obesity or overweight, without diabetes.
studies.safetySummary: The most frequent adverse events were gastrointestinal and were mostly mild to moderate.

sources.title: Tirzepatide for weight reduction in Chinese adults with obesity

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-Controlled Study to Investigate the Effect of Tirzepatide on the Reduction of Morbidity and Mortality in Adults With Obesity
studies.population: Adults with obesity, without type 2 diabetes, at increased cardiovascular risk.

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 2, Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-Controlled Study to Assess the Efficacy and Safety of Investigational Tirzepatide Doses in Participants With Type 2 Diabetes and Obesity
studies.population: Participants with type 2 diabetes and obesity.

studies.officialTitle: Tirzepatide Study of Renal Function in People With Overweight or Obesity and Chronic Kidney Disease With or Without Type 2 Diabetes: Focus on Kidney Hypoxia in Relation to Fatty Kidney Disease Using Multiparametric Magnetic Resonance Imaging
studies.population: Participants with overweight or obesity and chronic kidney disease, with or without type 2 diabetes.

studies.officialTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Tirzepatide Once Weekly Versus Placebo for the Treatment of Obesity and Weight-Related Comorbidities in Adolescents: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo- Controlled Trial (SURMOUNT-ADOLESCENTS-2)
studies.population: Adolescents with obesity and weight-related comorbidities.

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 3, Multicenter, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Parallel-Group Study Evaluating the Efficacy and Safety of Tirzepatide Once Weekly Compared to Placebo in Adult Participants With Type 1 Diabetes and Obesity or Overweight
studies.population: Adults with type 1 diabetes and obesity or overweight.

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 2, Double-Blind, Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Study of Bimagrumab and Tirzepatide, Alone or in Combination, to Investigate the Efficacy and Safety in Adult Participants With Obesity or Overweight Without Type 2 Diabetes
A Phase 2, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Proof-of-Concept Study of Once-Weekly Tirzepatide Plus Mibavademab Compared With Tirzepatide Alone in Adult Participants With Obesity

Efficacy and Safety of Ixekizumab or Ixekizumab Concomitantly Administered With Tirzepatide in Adult Participants With Moderate-to-Severe Plaque Psoriasis and Obesity or Overweight: A Phase 3b, Randomized, Multicenter, Open-Label Study (TOGETHER-PsO)
studies.population: Adults with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis and obesity or overweight.

studies.officialTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Ixekizumab or Ixekizumab Concomitantly Administered With Tirzepatide in Adult Participants With Active Psoriatic Arthritis and Obesity or Overweight: A Phase 3b, Randomized, Multicenter, Open-Label Study (TOGETHER-PsA)
studies.population: Adults with active psoriatic arthritis and obesity or overweight.

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 3b, Randomized, Multicenter, Controlled Study of Mirikizumab and Placebo or Mirikizumab Concomitantly Administered With Tirzepatide in Adult Participants With Moderately to Severely Active Ulcerative Colitis and Obesity or Overweight
studies.population: Participants with ulcerative colitis and obesity or overweight.

studies.officialTitle: A Phase 3b, Randomized, Multicenter, Controlled Study of Mirikizumab and Placebo or Mirikizumab Concomitantly Administered With Tirzepatide in Adult Participants With Moderately to Severely Active Crohn's Disease and Obesity or Overweight
studies.population: Participants with Crohn's disease and obesity or overweight.
